title: Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd!
